subtitle: Certifications in Snowflake, AWS, and Databricks that support my data platform work.

items.title: Snowflake SnowPro Core
items.text: Validated knowledge of Snowflake architecture, data loading, performance optimization, security, and best practices across production data warehouses.

items.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
items.text: Demonstrated understanding of AWS cloud concepts, core services, security, and cost management relevant to data and analytics platforms.

items.title: Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate
items.text: Proven ability to build data pipelines and transformations on Databricks using Spark, Delta Lake, and best practices for data engineering on the lakehouse.
